bead.title: Migration tool: .ddx/beads.jsonl + archive → axon backend
bead.description: Build a one-shot migration command (e.g., ddx bead migrate --to axon) that reads existing .ddx/beads.jsonl, .ddx/beads-archive.jsonl, and per-bead .ddx/attachments/ entries, and loads them losslessly into the axon backend. Idempotent and safe to re-run. Includes a verification pass: round-trip count, claim-state preservation, event-history preservation. Depends on the axon backend implementation child.
bead.acceptance: 1. Migration command implemented and wired into the CLI. 2. Migrates beads.jsonl + beads-archive.jsonl + attachments without data loss. 3. Idempotent (re-running is a no-op). 4. Verification step compares pre/post counts and event totals. 5. Integration test runs migration on a fixture repo and asserts equivalence.
